allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add privacy controls, security hardening, and platform fixes

Privacy & Data Isolation:
- Add sensitiveFieldFilter utility for role-based field filtering
- Restrict pay rate visibility to org_owner, co_owner, and authorized roles only
- Add RBAC to all payroll routes \(org_owner required\)
- Filter sensitive fields in employee API responses
- Prevent contractors from seeing other contractors'' pay rates
- Add self-access checks \(employees can see own pay/personal info\)
- Trinity/AI Brain maintains full internal access for orchestration

Security Hardening:
- Add CSRF protection middleware
- Add virus scanning middleware for file uploads
- Add WebSocket rate limiting
- Add email unsubscribe routes for CAN-SPAM compliance
- Add security audit endpoints
- Add configuration validator for startup checks

Platform Fixes:
- Fix helpdesk-progress-header useQuery missing queryFn
- Add ticket search API endpoints
- Add gamification weekly/monthly reset scheduling
- Fix credit race condition with atomic updates
- Fix coverage offer race condition with SELECT FOR UPDATE
- Add contractor rate fields for QuickBooks billing
- Add org code validator utility

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(for table in auditLogs chatMessages employeeDocuments users employees clients shifts invoices timeEntries scheduleTemplates workspaces exceptionTriageQueue partnerDataMappings partnerConnections externalEmailsSent emailDrafts helposFaqs notifications employeeCertifications timeOffRequests shiftSwapRequests invoiceLineItems leads leadActivities deals systemAuditLogs orgDocuments orgDocumentAccess orgDocumentSignatures orgInvitations salesProposals performanceReviews supportTickets)
Bash(head -5 echo echo "2. TIMESHEETS \(no such table - should be timeEntries\)" grep -n "timesheets" /home/runner/workspace/server/services/ai-brain/agent/stateVerificationService.ts)
Bash(head -5 echo echo "3. ORGANIZATIONS \(should be workspaces\)" grep -n "organizations" /home/runner/workspace/server/services/ai-brain/trinityContentGuardrails.ts)
Bash(head -5 echo echo "4. WEBHOOKEVENTS \(should be webhookSubscriptions or webhookDeliveries\)" grep -n "webhookEvents" /home/runner/workspace/server/services/integrations/webhookVerifier.ts)

Bash(head -5 echo echo "5. INTEGRATIONCREDENTIALS \(should be integrationApiKeys or integrationConnections\)" grep -n "integrationCredentials" /home/runner/workspace/server/services/quickbooksClientBillingSync.ts)
Bash(for f in chatrooms.tsx dashboard.tsx disputes.tsx employees.tsx HelpDesk.tsx quickbooks-import.tsx root-admin-dashboard.tsx workflow-approvals.tsx)
